summary: Kang Hyunwoo navigates the confusion surrounding the identity of the Alley King after a surprising revelation regarding a double identity. Following the controversy, he proceeds to clear the Jim Mountain Range, successfully securing Gerard's treasure map as a reward. Additionally, Hyunwoo's pet, Teng, reaches level 100 and begins its first awakening process.
key_moments: Confusion erupts over the discovery of two Alley Kings.
Kang Hyunwoo clears the Jim Mountain Range and obtains Gerard's treasure map.
Hyunwoo's pet, Teng, levels up and initiates its first awakening.
